title: Graaff-Reinet’s power out for 12 hours
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Dr Beyers Naudé Local Municipality reminds Graaff-Reinet residents of the planned interruption of electricity supply from 07:00 to 19:00 tomorrow, Wednesday 26 March.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Dr Beyers Naudé Local Municipality reminds Graaff-Reinet residents of the planned interruption of electricity supply from 07:00 to 19:00 tomorrow, Wednesday 26 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Eskom will do urgent maintenance work on substations and power lines in the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality can give no guarantee that the power will be off for the whole period given exactly, and consumers are warned that their installations must be treated as live at all times.","html":"The municipality can give no guarantee that the power will be off for the whole period given exactly, and consumers are warned that their installations must be treated as live at all times."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
